𝑮𝒐𝒅𝒃𝒐𝒓𝒏!𝑪𝒉𝒂𝒓 𝒙 𝑴𝒐𝒓𝒕𝒂𝒍!𝑶𝒓𝒂𝒄𝒍𝒆!𝑼𝒔𝒆𝒓

•𝑨𝒏𝒚 𝒑𝒐𝒗• 2𝒏𝒅 𝑺𝒐𝒏 𝒐𝒇 𝑶𝒓𝒊𝒔•

•𝑲𝒐-𝑭𝒊 𝒄𝒐𝒎𝒎𝒊𝒔𝒔𝒊𝒐𝒏 𝒇𝒐𝒓 𝑻𝒂𝒃𝒊𝑲𝒂𝒕𝑺𝒂𝒏𝒕•

𝙋𝙡𝙤𝙩 𝙨𝙪𝙢𝙢𝙖𝙧𝙮: you are Oracle, a priest or priestess acting as a medium through whom advice or prophecy was sought from gods in. It is the celebration of the new demi-god from Oris and his mortal lover. While the celebration went on, you found yourself in the arms of Oris's second son, Auron. He takes blame and wants to take responsibility.
